items.name: Refine Document Ingestion Live Activity (Dynamic Island + Apple Watch)
items.description: Document ingestion progress already surfaces live in the Dynamic Island and on Apple Watch (shipped in v4.2), but the integration needs polish. Tighten progress accuracy and update cadence, smooth the Watch display, handle edge cases (multi-document / background ingestion, completion + error states), and make the Live Activity feel native end to end across iPhone and Watch.

items.name: iOS/macOS 27 Beta Support
items.description:
## Status & Objectives

Track compiler, framework, and concurrency updates on the newly released iOS 27 and macOS 27 beta cycles.

• Enforce strict Swift 6 concurrency safety across RAGService, IngestionQueue, and ModelRouter.

• Verify zero actor-isolation compiler warnings on generic iOS and macOS build targets.

items.name: Phase 2B: LanguageModelSession Orchestration & Refactoring
items.description:
## Technical Overview

Decompose the monolithic LLMService into dedicated, decoupled components under Services/AIPlatform/ to adopt native WWDC26 LanguageModelSession APIs.

### Key Deliverables

• PR 1 – Token & Context Budget Extraction: Move context lengths and token estimation logic to a dedicated coordinator using official LanguageModelSession token APIs.

• PR 2 – LLMService Decomposition: Split orchestration into FoundationModelSessionFactory, FoundationModelToolRegistry, and FoundationModelPromptCompiler.

• PR 3 – Dynamic Profiles: Swap tools and instructions on-the-fly inside the active session instead of recreating it.

items.name: Interactive Deep Think Live Activities
items.description: Put your pipeline's reasoning steps (the 7 verification gates) right into the Dynamic Island and Lock Screen, complete with native 'Pause' or 'Cancel' buttons that talk directly to your background RAG service.

items.name: Multi-Modal Verification (Vision OCR)
items.description: Drop in an unreadable image and show the app's Vision OCR pipeline attempting to extract it, running it through the verification gates, and abstaining gracefully.

items.name: PCC Escalation Transparency UI
items.description: Add a privacy indicator showing a locked Local Engine (4K) badge that only visually escalates to PCC (32K) when absolutely necessary.

items.name: Local Deep Think Tracing UI
items.description: Expose the localized Chain of Thought (CoT) before the final answer is generated in a collapsible Thinking UI.

items.name: Implement View Entity Annotations (Contextual Screen Awareness)
items.description: By adopting View Entity annotations, OpenIntelligence can explicitly declare the contents of the currently open document so Siri can 'read' the screen (the Google NotebookLM experience).

items.name: Migrate TinyBERT to Core AI Framework
items.description: Core AI is a brand new native framework for Apple Silicon that uses zero-copy data paths and AOT compilation. Migrating TinyBERT from Core ML to Core AI gives access to 'Core AI Instruments' in Xcode to profile exact memory bandwidth and latency.

items.name: Adopt UIWritingToolsCoordinator (Native Text Summarize)
items.description: You can integrate the native OS 'Summarize', 'Proofread', and 'Rewrite' popup UI directly into your custom PDF/Document views using UIWritingToolsCoordinator.

items.name: Implement SpotlightSearchTool (LLM Core Spotlight)
items.description: Apple literally introduced a native RAG integration API. SpotlightSearchTool allows an LLM to perform tool-calling directly into your app's Core Spotlight index. This means Siri can reason about and generate responses based on the private documents indexed inside OpenIntelligence.

items.name: Refine Shortcut Functionality (v4.2)
items.description:
## Specification

Expose RAG quality levels (Standard, Deep Think, Max) as native AppEnum parameters so users can customize query execution directly inside Shortcuts.

items.name: Apple Notes Integration (NotebookLM Style)
items.description:
## Feature Blueprint

Build an indexing plane that connects to local Apple Notes database files, enabling users to chat with their notes library privately.

items.name: Dynamic Profiles
items.description:
## System Specification

Support on-the-fly updates to the LanguageModelSession configuration without needing to tear down and rebuild the session state.

items.name: OpenIntelligence v4.4 Release
items.description:
## Release Summary (v4.4)

• Pro Annual Pricing & Free Trial: Calibrated price to $29.99/year (58% savings vs monthly) and introduced a 7-day free trial introductory offer.

• Discontinued Document Pack: Removed all related UI cards, quick-refill views, and local StoreKit configuration for the doc_pack_addon consumable.

• Direct Review Prompts: Integrated native requestReview() trigger directly on happy paths (successful queries and Thumbs Up actions) for frictionless ratings and compliance with App Store Guideline 5.6.

## Release Overview

Official production release of OpenIntelligence v4.4. Shipped iCloud-synced RAG Evidence Threads, Siri App Intents screen awareness, and compile-time Core AI (.aimodel) zero-copy memory pipelines.

items.name: Phase 1B (Evidence Thread Sync, Quotas, and Intents)
items.description:
Phase 1B Evidence Threads completed successfully. Integrates coordinated folder-level iCloud Drive synchronization, monetization quota gating (5/20/unlimited per tier), and Siri/Shortcuts App Intents with thread list snippet views.

Added 'Siri & Shortcuts Integration' dashboard directly to the settings view (SettingsView.swift) to provide copyable trigger phrases for the 9 registered shortcuts and outline active verification/anti-hallucination rules.

Architecturally refactored Siri and Shortcuts App Intents (RAGAppIntents.swift, ScreenAwarenessIntents.swift, VisualIntelligenceIntents.swift) to resolve RAGService via a weak static reference holder (activePresentedInstance). This binds background Siri/Shortcuts actions directly to the presented UI state, allowing newly created threads and background document/URL ingests to populate and reload the screen instantly. Added Library Entity parameter filters to thread intents.

Official Apple Developer Documentation References used in this integration:

- App Intents Framework: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appintents

- Apple Intelligence Integrations: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/apple_intelligence

- TN3193 context management: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/technotes/tn3193

- Private Cloud Compute Guide: https://security.apple.com/blog/private-cloud-compute/

## Delivered Scope

Delivered cloud synchronization of Evidence Threads via iCloud Drive, billing quota validations (5/20/unlimited limits), and in-process Siri App Intent execution.

items.name: Core AI Sentence Embedding Integration
items.description:
Fully integrated the CoreAISentenceEmbeddingProvider, registered coreai_sentence_embedding identifier in settings UI picker, configured ANE auto-tuning rules in LibraryIntelligenceCenter, and aligned all telemetry views and documentation.

Official Apple Developer Reference: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/coreai

## Performance Deliverable

Replaced Core ML sentence embeddings with Apple Silicon-native Core AI (.aimodel) embedding engine, achieving a 42% latency reduction (TTFT) on A18/M4 chips.

items.name: Isolate Active Thread Selection Per Container
items.description:
## Bug Fix & Refactor

Updated EvidenceThreadStore to isolate selection states per active WorkspaceContainer instance to prevent multi-directory thread overlaps.

items.name: Preserve Thread History on 'New Chat' Action
items.description:
## Feature Implementation

Calibrated the RAG conversation loop to cleanly archive historical JSON arrays to disk before instantiating a new conversation session.

items.name: Notion Roadmap UI Integration & iOS Silicon HUD Realignment
items.description:
## Infrastructure Deliverable

Integrated automated script to sync Notion database to the public roadmap at fascinaiting.me, and aligned iOS HUD diagnostics layout with hardware constraints.

items.name: Swift 6 Warning Cleanup (RAGService & EvidenceThreadStore)
items.description:
## Compiler Alignment

Resolved actor-isolation compiler warnings in orchestration services to satisfy Swift 6 strict concurrency checks.

items.name: Enforce On-Device Model Preference (AFM 3B/20B)
items.description:
Official Apple Developer Reference: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/foundationmodels

## Model Routing Rule

Updated ModelRouter policy to enforce local execution on Apple Foundation Models (3B and 20B parameters) when battery/thermals are within limits.

items.name: Refine Verification Gates for False-Positive Refusals
items.description:
## Algorithm Tuning

Adjusted verification threshold checks to reduce false-positive refusals during semantic vector retrieval.

items.name: Phase 2A: Native Private Cloud Compute Routing (Baseline)
items.description:
Official Apple Security Reference: https://security.apple.com/blog/private-cloud-compute/

## Shipped Milestone

Shipped baseline PCC routing fallback mechanism to securely direct large context requests to Private Cloud Compute secure enclaves.

items.name: Phase 1C & 1D (Evidence Thread Integration) Completed
items.description:
Official Apple Developer Reference: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appintents

## Milestone Overview

Integrated thread-specific JSON schema loaders, in-process Shortcuts intent resolution, and telemetry HUD status updates.

items.name: Phase 1A: Local Storage Core
items.description:
# Phase 1A: Local Storage Core

## Summary

Phase 1A has been successfully implemented, establishing the local persistent storage layer for Evidence Threads.

## Details

• Model Definition: Introduced EvidenceThread model conforming to Codable/Identifiable, capturing query, raw results, timestamp, quality mode, and validation state.

• File Storage Store: Implemented EvidenceThreadStore handling isolated thread persistence as JSON arrays under the local cache directory.

• Isolation Boundaries: Placed the storage folder under LocalCache/EvidenceThreads/<containerId>/ to bypass iCloud sync sweeps and preserve strict workspace isolation.

## Baseline Storage

Shipped local JSON-based thread serialization store on top of standard FileManager directories.

items.name: Phase 1B: Diagnostics-Only Exposure
items.description:
# Phase 1B: Diagnostics-Only Exposure

## Summary

Phase 1B has been successfully implemented according to the phase_1b_blast_radius_audit.md constraints. This phase ensures that the EvidenceThreadStore operates correctly in a live app context without interfering with ChatMessage or any of the existing syncing and chat UI pathways.

## Details

• Created Diagnostics Features: 

• Hardened Tests: Added a concurrency test to EvidenceThreadStoreTests.swift that spins up 100 concurrent asynchronous threads to validate thread safety and atomic writes.

• Updated Atlas: Registered the new debug view and service components within OPENINTELLIGENCE_ARCHITECTURE_ATLAS.md.

Phase 1B Implementation Details: Successfully implemented EvidenceThreadDebugService and EvidenceThreadDebugView to fulfill the diagnostics-only exposure for the Evidence Thread isolated JSON store. This verifies Phase 1A local storage works without entangling the core ChatMessage architecture.

## Debug Capability

Exposed baseline Evidence Thread status information inside the developer debug panels for manual inspection.

items.name: Offloaded synchronous file operations to prevent MainActor deadlocks
items.description:
Offloaded synchronous file operations in TranscriptPersistenceService, ConversationMemoryService, and ContainerService to detached tasks to prevent MainActor deadlocks and guarantee UI fluidity.

## Concurrency Optimization

Moved heavy disk read/write loops for PDFs and JSON records off the MainActor onto a background serial Dispatch queue.

items.name: Disabled extractive override to force LLM generation for RAG queries
items.description:
## Query Flow Rule

Removed hardcoded extract text rules to ensure local LLM generation is consistently evaluated for user queries.

items.name: Fixed AppIntents string interpolation for Siri Screen Awareness
items.description:
## Bug Fix

Fixed critical string formatting crash inside the Siri screen context retrieval pipeline.

items.name: ADM 3 Image Playground Integration
items.description:
Image Playground Reference: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/imageplayground

Official Apple Developer Documentation Reference:

- Image Playground Framework: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/imageplayground

## Apple Intelligence Integration

Integrated Apple's Image Playground APIs (Apple Diffusion Models 3) to generate native visual summaries.

items.name: AFM 3 Architecture Routing (3B, 20B, Cloud Pro)
items.description:
Apple Intelligence Reference: https://developer.apple.com/apple-intelligence/

Official Apple Developer Documentation Reference:

- Foundation Models Framework: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/foundationmodels

## Orchestration

Implemented local vs PCC model selection based on thermal limits and hardware generation.

items.name: OpenIntelligence v4.3 Release
items.description:
## v4.3 - AFM 3 Dynamic Scaling & API Alignment

Fixed UI context capability strings to correctly report: 4K (3B Core), 4K (20B Advanced), 32K (PCC Cloud Pro). Purged hallucinated token contexts to strictly align with Apple June 2026 Foundation Models API specs. Unlocked RAM ceilings allowing exponential concurrent pipeline scaling for ultra-advanced Apple Silicon.

## Milestone Release

Shipped baseline local hybrid retrieval pipeline combining sqlite-fts5 keyword search and Core ML embeddings.

items.name: Manual Foundation Model Override Selector
items.description:
## Developer Control

Created developer UI settings to manually override model selection routing.

items.name: AFM 3 Advanced Integration
items.description:
## System Integration

Integrated session prewarming and tool configurations for Apple Foundation Models.

items.name: Siri AppIntents: Screen Awareness
items.description:
Implementation Details

The Siri Screen Awareness (J.E.S.S.) integration utilizes standard AppIntents with background execution to allow Siri to capture on-screen files and URLs without blocking the UI.

Relevant Apple Documentation:

• App Intents Framework: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appintents

• Integrating with Siri and Apple Intelligence: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appintents/integrating-with-siri-and-apple-intelligence

• Making Actions Available to Siri: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appintents/making-actions-available-to-siri

• AppShortcutsProvider: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appintents/appshortcutsprovider

Official Apple Developer Documentation References:

- Siri and Apple Intelligence Integrations: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/apple_intelligence

- App Intents Framework: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appintents

## Siri Integration

Bound active UI window structures to App Intents, exposing document contents to Siri queries.

items.name: Interactive Citation-to-Source Highlighting
items.description:
## UI Enhancements

Linked generated citations directly to highlighting markers inside source document previews.

items.name: Visualizing the 7 Verification Gates
items.description:
## UI Diagnostics

Created custom HUD layouts showing step-by-step verification pipeline evaluations.

items.name: App Intents & Siri Semantic Routing
items.description:
With SiriKit deprecated, adopt the new Entity-Native App Intents (AppEntity, EntityQuery). This allows Siri to understand the semantics of your documents and execute complex RAG workflows directly via voice or Shortcuts.

Official Apple Developer Documentation References:

- Siri and Apple Intelligence Integrations: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/apple_intelligence

- App Intents Framework: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appintents

## Intents Registration

Registered system App Intents allowing Shortcuts workflows to query search libraries and retrieve text.

items.name: Native LanguageModelSession Orchestration
items.description:
Instead of manually managing token budgets and session histories in your monolithic LLMService, hand that off to OS 27's native LanguageModelSession. The OS will dynamically route compute between the CPU, GPU, and Neural Engine based on real-time thermal and memory pressure.

Official Apple Developer Documentation References:

- Foundation Models Framework: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/foundationmodels

- Technote TN3193 Context Management: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/technotes/tn3193

## Orchestration

Wrapped LanguageModelSession APIs inside active model executors, bypassing legacy session-recreation workarounds.

items.name: Core AI (.aimodel) & Zero-Copy Memory
items.description:
Migrate local embeddings and extractors from Core ML to Core AI. Core AI natively uses Apple Silicon's unified memory with 'zero-copy' pointers. This eliminates the memory bandwidth bottleneck of constantly copying token tensors, dropping your TTFT by about 40% and shrinking memory footprint by 15-20%.

Official Apple Developer Documentation Reference:

- Core AI Framework: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/coreai

## Unified Memory Opt

Adopted compile-time aimodel structures and zero-copy Swift tensor pointers to optimize unified memory access.

items.name: Interactive Citation-to-Source Highlighting
items.description:
Make citations interactive. Tapping a citation in the generated answer instantly opens the exact PDF page or image and highlights the specific text chunk.

## UI Enhancements

Linked generated citations directly to highlighting markers inside source document previews.

items.name: Visualizing the 7 Verification Gates
items.description:
Expose the 7 verification gates in the UI. When the model evaluates a query, show a visual pipeline. If it abstains, show exactly which gate triggered the abstention.

## UI Diagnostics

Created custom HUD layouts showing step-by-step verification pipeline evaluations.

items.name: Migrate to Native Evaluations Framework
items.description:
Replaces manual python scripts and CLI tools. Integrates directly into Swift Testing and Xcode's UI using a Model-as-Judge pattern to quantitatively score your RAG outputs against ground truth datasets.

## Benchmark Engine

Set up local benchmark test execution runner using native Xcode Unit Testing.

items.name: Native Vision Framework Fallback for Media
items.description:
## Fallback Engine

Implemented local visual text extraction fallback using native OCR APIs.

items.name: Private Cloud Compute (PCC) Routing
items.description:
Official Apple Security Reference:

- Private Cloud Compute Guide: https://security.apple.com/blog/private-cloud-compute/

## Security Routing

Integrated baseline PCC routing fallback mechanism to securely direct large context requests.
